action.name: Copy with Freally File Manager
Copiar con Freally File Manager
用 Freally File Manager 复制
Freally File Manager के साथ कॉपी करें
انسخ باستخدام Freally File Manager
Copiar com Freally File Manager
Копировать через Freally File Manager
Freally File Manager でコピー
Mit Freally File Manager kopieren
Copier avec Freally File Manager
Freally File Manager로 복사
Copia con Freally File Manager
Freally File Manager ile kopyala
Sao chép bằng Freally File Manager
Kopiuj za pomocą Freally File Manager
Kopiëren met Freally File Manager
Salin dengan Freally File Manager
Копіювати через Freally File Manager
action.description: Queue a copy job with Freally File Manager v1.0.0

action.name: Move with Freally File Manager
Mover con Freally File Manager
用 Freally File Manager 移动
Freally File Manager के साथ मूव करें
انقل باستخدام Freally File Manager
Mover com Freally File Manager
Переместить через Freally File Manager
Freally File Manager で移動
Mit Freally File Manager verschieben
Déplacer avec Freally File Manager
Freally File Manager로 이동
Sposta con Freally File Manager
Freally File Manager ile taşı
Di chuyển bằng Freally File Manager
Przenieś za pomocą Freally File Manager
Verplaatsen met Freally File Manager
Pindahkan dengan Freally File Manager
Перемістити через Freally File Manager
action.description: Queue a move job with Freally File Manager v1.0.0
